name: emo__calm-but-strange-organism-like__0001
promptKo:
목표: 감정(무드)에 따라 자연스러운 형상과 질감을 가진 도자기 오브젝트 1개(병/단지/화병 형태) 생성.
감정/무드(Emotion/Mood): calm but strange, organism-like
추가 요청: textile-like relief, pleats, glaze pooling
재질: 반드시 도자기(세라믹)만. 도자기 안에서 유약/소성/바디/컬러/마감은 감정에 맞게 자동 선택.
형태 제약: 구(스피어) 금지. 정확히 오브젝트 1개만 (유기적 실루엣).
환경: 순백(#FFFFFF) 배경, 미니멀 스튜디오, 다른 오브젝트 없음.
금지: 텍스트/로고/라벨/워터마크/설명 문구.
promptEn:
GOAL: Generate one realistic handmade ceramic object image for product visualization.
EMOTION: 차분하면서도 이질적인 생명체 느낌
VISUAL_WORDS_EN: EMOTION: Calm yet alien lifeform feeling
NOTES: textile-like relief, pleats, glaze pooling
CONSTRAINTS: One object only (organic vase/jar/bottle-like). Pure white background (#FFFFFF). No props. No text/logos/watermarks. Not a sphere.
promptCmf: A photorealistic handmade studio art ceramic object (organic vase/jar/bottle-like, but not a generic simple bottle) isolated on a pure white background (#FFFFFF). Mood: calm yet alien lifeform feeling. Visual words: biomorphic soft deformable silhouette with textile-like pleated relief, deep glaze pooling with subtle breaks, satin finish, gentle ribbing texture, tiny pinholes and soft crazing micro-imperfections. High-end studio product photograph: centered composition, deep focus, ultra-sharp, realistic PBR response, crisp but soft edge highlights, subtle clean contact shadow only. No props, no extra objects, no floor scene. No text, no logos, no labels, no watermark. Exactly one object. Do not generate a sphere.
driveError: Service Accounts do not have storage quota. Leverage shared drives (https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/about-shareddrives), or use OAuth delegation (http://support.google.com/a/answer/7281227) instead.
